commit_scope: Prove Form-native application graph mutation wrappers execute against a rollback-safe live PostgreSQL fixture before any public mutation flip.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_application_graph_live_db_trial.py tests/test_application_graph_node_port_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_application_graph_live_db_trial.py tests/test_application_graph_node_port_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
local_validation.summary: form/scripts/application-graph-live-db-test.sh self-provisioned a throwaway local Postgres and ran form/form-stdlib/integration/application-graph-live-db.fk through the Rust kernel with the Form-native application graph mutation wrappers. Verdict 1111111 proved connect, fixture schema creation, agn-create-node with graph_node_revisions readback, agn-update-node with next per-node revision readback, agn-delete-node with graph_edges cleanup readback, fixture table cleanup, and connection close.

known_limitations.observed: No ordinary public POST/PATCH/DELETE traffic moved. The live DB trial runs in a throwaway database only.
The proof verifies application graph table effects. It does not yet project results into IdeaWithScore or SpecRegistryEntry.
Cache invalidation, parent/edge repair beyond deleted-node edge cleanup, resonance re-attunement, and contributor-key audit updates remain follow-up proof.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of the native graph mutation live DB proof commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted. This slice intentionally avoids the production application database and keeps the public front-door flip blocked.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-native application graph mutation wrappers now have live PostgreSQL execution proof in a rollback-safe fixture database. The public route still fans out to FastAPI by default.
test_flows: form/scripts/application-graph-live-db-test.sh -> verdict: 1111111 and application graph live DB PASS
agn-create-node -> graph_nodes row plus graph_node_revisions revision 1 read back
agn-update-node -> graph_nodes update plus graph_node_revisions count 2 read back
agn-delete-node -> target graph_nodes row removed and connected graph_edges row removed

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_application_graph_live_db_trial.py tests/test_application_graph_node_port_form.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py -> 27 passed

phase_gate.reason: Live DB execution proof is complete for the Form-native application graph wrappers; public mutable front-door execution still needs route response projection parity, cache/side-effect proof, contributor-key audit proof, and a reversible public flip gate.
